problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: If Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
